## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Projectmark and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance showing slow uptick in clicks (129 from 106) with 7,000 more impressions](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [10 new articles ready for publication, all articles now have images](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Focus on creating downloadable templates and resources to enrich content](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Multiple optimization efforts underway: interlinking, metadata improvements, CTA additions](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Clicks increased from 106 to 129](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Impressions up by 7,000](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Best ranking keywords for each page added to performance tab](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - Example: "Sierra Finals for marketing" article ranking \#4 for its keyword

### Content Creation and Publication

  - [10 new articles ready, all with images](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Gus to push articles live after checking, likely late Thursday/Friday](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [New topic suggestions provided with search volumes and keyword difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Some topics approved (e.g., construction proposal example, social media tips)](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Others deemed too general or technical (e.g., best contractor software)](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

### Content Enrichment Strategy

  - [Plan to create downloadable templates/PDFs for articles](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Potential templates: proposal, pipeline stages](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Andrej offered assistance with Canva for design and branding](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Aim to give content a "winning edge" over competitors](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)

### Optimization Efforts

  - [Interlinking: Added links to best-performing articles, 10 more planned](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Metadata optimization: Updated titles and descriptions for 10 low CTR articles](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [CTA additions: Added banner CTAs to \~80 articles, aiming for all 400 by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Content refresh: First batch of 10 articles updated, ready for republishing](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Webinars and Content Repurposing

  - [Client-only webinar on new features (Feb 13)](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Partner webinar on 2025 construction industry outlook (March 18)](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Potential lead-gen webinar in April](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Plan to repurpose webinar content into unique articles using established workflows](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### Website Technical Issues

  - [Numerous non-indexed pages discovered in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [1,366 404 errors, mostly related to old product (app.projectmark.com)](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Gus to consult web developer about removing or no-indexing these pages](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

### Recent Performance Spike

  - [Notable increase in clicks across several articles on previous day](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Top performers: "Ultimate Construction Guide", "Managing Relationships in Construction", and "Top 5 AI Tools for Innovation"](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Gus to publish new and refreshed articles late Thursday/Friday](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Discuss and plan downloadable template creation via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Andrej to continue metadata optimization and interlinking efforts](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Gus to address non-indexed pages with web developer](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Plan content repurposing strategy for upcoming webinars](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance, aiming for increased CTR](https://fathom.video/share/L7FsMkXkpHLFaPzYUBjEaBR1xNZA2Bk4?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
